opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My joints are screaming in agony, my muscles feel bruised all over, and I physically cannot stand up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My joints flared badly over the last 12 hours and I can't weight-bear — I had to crawl to bed and I'm on my own.

symptom_narrative.character: agonising joint pain in knees, ankles and wrists that moves around, plus bruised-feeling muscles
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: 9-10/10; I can't stand or bear weight
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: knees and ankles mostly, also wrists; it shifts between joints
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: a recurrent flare like my Ross River pattern
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: crushing fatigue and muscle aches all over
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I had Ross River virus 18 months ago and get these waxing-waning joint flares

past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: after Ross River infection 18 months ago

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing relevant that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone, the house is cluttered, and I can't stand from my low mattress

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes the joint pain and immobility clearly, in obvious pain

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single home reading; cannot exclude a rising fever

objective_data_offered.value: my knees and ankles are sore and a bit swollen but none is bright red or dramatically hotter than the others
I can't put weight on my legs at all
